creator: ports@mark.reidel.info
text:
All slave ports were marked as BROKEN, because the file was unfetchable. This
patch makes the bluecurve-themes fetchable again and updates to the current
release of Fedora7. Patches for unbreaking the slave-ports follow

Port maintainer (jylefort@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
